first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. Minor differences in wording ("engineer" vs. "craftsman", slight rephrasing of concerns about side projects) are well within the range of normal run-to-run linguistic variation and do not reflect any change in the model's assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the new location.
